howTit: From registration to your first client in 10 minutes.
howSub: Three steps. You own the plan, clients know where to look, the system sends check-in reminders.

steps.d: In a few minutes you define how you work: which check-in fields matter, what a week looks like. If you can use a phone, you can do this.
Send a link. Your client installs the app and sees training and nutrition in one place. No more five different chats.
Check-ins, payments and clients in one view. Less time on tools, more time for training and real conversations.

testimonials.q: Finally one place for everything. I used to use WhatsApp, Excel and random apps. Now everything is in one tool and I save an hour a day.
testimonials.name: Mark K.

testimonials.q: I went from 8 to 15 clients without extra stress. The system reminds clients automatically and I instantly see who's late with check-in.
testimonials.name: Tom N.

testimonials.q: Clients love the mobile app. They have every plan at hand and send check-in in two minutes. Looks much more professional than before.
testimonials.name: Sara P.

testimonials.q: The busywork dropped to a minimum. Plans, payments and chat - all in one place. Clients are happy and I have more time for the actual work.
testimonials.name: Luke H.

testimonials.q: I know exactly who paid and when each subscription expires. No more notebooks and forgotten payments. I recommend it to every coach.
testimonials.name: Maja R.

testimonials.q: As a client, I love having everything in one app. My coach sends a plan, I send a check-in, he sees progress. No messages everywhere.
testimonials.name: Ana M.

testimonials.q: I've used UnitLift for 4 months and the difference is huge. All plans in one app, my coach sees every check-in, chat runs smooth.
testimonials.name: Ivan B.

testimonials.q: Weekly check-ins changed how I train. My coach sees where I'm stuck and adjusts the plan. Like having a trainer in my pocket.
testimonials.name: Petra L.

faqs.q: Do I need a card to register?
faqs.a: Yes, a card is required to activate the trial, but you're not charged immediately. Billing starts after 14 days. Cancel anytime, no penalties.

faqs.q: Do my clients have to pay for the app?
faqs.a: No. The client app is free on iOS and Android. You send them access and they instantly see plans, submit check-ins and chat with you.

faqs.q: How long does setup take?
faqs.a: Less than 5 minutes. Set up your profile, customize parameters and invite your first client the same day. If you can use a phone, you can use UnitLift.

faqs.q: What's the real difference from WhatsApp and a spreadsheet?
faqs.a: Everything runs through one tool. Plans aren't in a chat, check-ins aren't in three places, and you see who paid on one screen.

faqs.q: Is this online coaching software and a workout plan app in one?
faqs.a: Yes - web for you, app for your client. Same data, same check-in, same training and meal plan. One loop instead of a pile of apps.

faqs.q: Does UnitLift work on mobile for coaches?
faqs.a: Yes. The web app is responsive and you can add it to your home screen. Clients get native iOS and Android apps for daily use.

faqs.q: Can I have my own logo and colors?
faqs.a: On Pro and Scale - yes. You add a logo and colors, and the client app feels like your brand, not ours.

faqs.q: How do client payments work - is that tracked here?
faqs.a: You see who paid, who hasn't and your totals for a period. Your agreement with the client is still yours - this is the visibility layer.

seoPage.heroH1: Software that replaces WhatsApp and Excel
seoPage.heroSub: For online personal trainers: training and meal plans, weekly check-ins and payment tracking - on one screen. More clients, less chaos.
seoPage.heroNote: Card required for activation · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime
seoPage.problemH2:
Online coaching without proper software
is chaos that compounds
seoPage.problemSub: Messages in WhatsApp, plans in Excel, payments on paper. It works with 5 clients. At 15, things start slipping.

problemCards.title: WhatsApp as a "system"
problemCards.text: Training plans are sent as photos or PDFs. The client can't find an older plan. You don't know if they even saw the new one.

problemCards.title: Excel for client tracking
problemCards.text: A spreadsheet with names, dates and notes. You enter every check-in by hand. You lose an hour a week on copy-paste that fixes nothing.

problemCards.title: Payments without a system
problemCards.text: Who paid this month? Whose subscription expires soon? Without an overview, you forget to ask and lose money that's yours.

seoPage.featSub: UnitLift brings everything a coach needs into one web app. The mobile app for clients is included free.

features.title: Training and nutrition plans
features.desc: Create a plan for each client. They see it immediately in the app - no PDFs, no WhatsApp messages.

features.title: Weekly check-in
features.desc: Client fills in a check-in in 2 minutes from their phone. You instantly see measurements, photos and notes - all archived.

features.title: Integrated chat
features.desc: All client messages in one place. No more tangled WhatsApp threads and lost messages about training.

features.title: Payment tracking
features.desc: See who paid, who's late and how much you earned this month. No manual tracking, no awkward asks.

features.title: Mobile app for clients
features.desc: Clients download the free iOS or Android app. Plans are in the app, not stuck in a PDF.

seoPage.usecaseH2: Built for online fitness coaches of all kinds

usecases.title: Personal trainer going online
usecases.text: You have 10-20 clients and you've been running on WhatsApp. You want to look more professional and stop losing an hour a day to messages and spreadsheets.

usecases.title: Strength coach with a full schedule
usecases.text: You have 30-50 clients and manual tracking doesn't work anymore. You need a system that reminds clients and shows who paid.

usecases.title: Nutritionist adding coaching
usecases.text: You build nutrition plans and need one place where the client sees macros, logs progress and talks to you. No 4 separate apps.

faqs.q: What's the difference between UnitLift and Trainerize?
faqs.a: Trainerize is a large English-only app for bigger coaching operations. UnitLift is simpler, in English and Croatian, with clear pricing and 5-minute setup.

faqs.q: Do my clients have to pay for the app?
faqs.a: No. The client mobile app is free on iOS and Android. The coach pays the subscription - the client pays nothing.

faqs.q: How quickly can I start?
faqs.a: Less than 5 minutes. Set up your profile, adjust parameters and invite your first client the same day. No long manuals.

faqs.q: Can I try UnitLift without being charged?
faqs.a: Yes. All plans include a 14-day free trial. A card is required for activation, but billing starts after the trial. Cancel anytime.

faqs.q: Does UnitLift work on mobile for coaches?
faqs.a: Yes. The web app is responsive and you can add it to your home screen. Clients have a separate iOS and Android app for daily use.

seoPageApp.heroH1: The personal trainer app clients actually use
seoPageApp.heroSub: Every client gets a free mobile app with plans, check-ins and chat. You look more professional - without PDFs or WhatsApp messages.
seoPageApp.heroNote: Card required for activation · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime
seoPageApp.problemTag: The problem without a proper app
seoPageApp.problemH2:
Clients who have to hunt for their plan
quit quickly
seoPageApp.problemSub: The quality of your work shouldn't depend on whether a client can find a PDF. The client experience starts the second they leave the gym.

problemCards.title: Plan buried in chat
problemCards.text: The client scrolls through weeks of messages to find the plan. Which one is new? They keep asking, you keep explaining the same thing.

problemCards.title: PDF nobody opens
problemCards.text: You send a tidy PDF, the client saves it and never opens it. No notifications, no tracking, no feedback loop.

problemCards.title: Every change - new message
problemCards.text: You change one exercise and send a new document. The client doesn't know which version is current. More time on sending than coaching.

seoPageApp.featH2:
Plan, check-in and chat -
all on one screen.
seoPageApp.featSub: Clients get a free iOS and Android app. No explaining, no hunting for PDFs.

features.title: Plans always available
features.desc: The client opens the app and sees the current training and nutrition plan. No searching, no questions.

features.title: Check-in in 2 minutes
features.desc: The client submits the weekly check-in from their phone. You see measurements, photos and notes - all archived.

features.title: Chat without WhatsApp
features.desc: All messages between you and the client stay in the app. Clear, organized, and separate from private life.

features.title: Progress tracking
features.desc: The client sees their own progress through charts and comparisons. When results show on screen, motivation stays up.

features.title: Automatic reminders
features.desc: The system reminds the client about check-in, a new plan or an unanswered message. Nothing sent by hand.

seoPageApp.featVisualStatLbl: Clients submit check-in on time · Platform average: 42%
seoPageApp.usecaseH2: For coaches who care about the impression they make

usecases.title: Coach building a brand
usecases.text: Clients recommend you - partly because your app looks professional. Pro and Scale plans include your own logo and colors.

usecases.title: Coach with more than 10 clients
usecases.text: With more than 10 clients, sending plans by hand gets old fast. UnitLift delivers plans automatically - every client sees theirs instantly.

usecases.title: Coach who wants fewer messages
usecases.text: Clients with everything in one app send half as many questions. Chat stays for coaching, not for finding plans.

faqs.q: What's the difference between UnitLift and Trainerize?
faqs.a: Trainerize is a large English-only app for bigger coaching operations. UnitLift is simpler, in English and Croatian, with clear pricing and 5-minute setup.

faqs.q: Do clients have to pay for the app?
faqs.a: No. The client mobile app is free on iOS and Android. The coach pays the subscription - clients pay nothing.

faqs.q: Can I have my own logo?
faqs.a: Yes, on Pro and Scale plans. Add a logo and pick primary colors - clients see your brand, not UnitLift's.

faqs.q: What does the client see in the app?
faqs.a: Training and nutrition plans, weekly check-in, progress history, chat with the coach and their own profile. All on one screen.

faqs.q: Does the app work on iPhone and Android?
faqs.a: Yes. The client app is on the App Store and Google Play. Free download, no credit card needed for clients.

seoPageCoaching.heroH1: The online coaching software that grows with your practice
seoPageCoaching.heroSub: UnitLift replaces a messy stack of tools with one system. From your first clients to a full practice - without switching tools.
seoPageCoaching.heroNote: Card required for activation · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime
seoPageCoaching.problemH2:
Every new client brings
more busywork, not more revenue
seoPageCoaching.problemSub: At some point, busywork overtakes coaching. You answer messages, dig through spreadsheets and resend the same PDFs. Instead of coaching clients.

problemCards.title: Excel and WhatsApp eat your hours
problemCards.text: A coach with 15 clients loses 8-10 hours a week on Excel, WhatsApp and sending plans. That's a full workday that could be coaching.

problemCards.title: Every new client - another scramble
problemCards.text: Onboarding takes an hour because you do it by hand. If it took 10 minutes, you could take on twice as many clients.

problemCards.title: Who even paid?
problemCards.text: Who paid last month? Whose package expires? Without an overview, you miss money that's yours - and feel awkward asking.

seoPageCoaching.featH2:
Everything on one screen -
no tool juggling.
seoPageCoaching.featSub: UnitLift takes over the busywork. You focus on the clients.

features.title: Onboarding in 5 minutes
features.desc: Send the client a link - they download the app and see their plan. No long setup, no emails with attachments.

features.title: Automatic check-in reminders
features.desc: The system sends weekly reminders to clients. Submission rate jumps from 40% to 90% - without a message from you.

features.title: Finances on one screen
features.desc: See who paid, who's late and what you earned this month. No manual tracking, no awkward asks.

features.title: Plan template library
features.desc: Build a plan once, copy and customize. Every new client gets a personalized plan in minutes, not an hour.

features.title: Overview of all clients
features.desc: One view, every client. You see who's progressing, who's late with check-in and who needs attention.

seoPageCoaching.usecaseH2: For online coaches - from first client to fiftieth

usecases.title: From 0 to your first 10 clients
usecases.text: Setup takes 5 minutes. You look more professional than coaches sending PDFs. Clients stay because there's a real system behind the work.

usecases.title: From 10 to 50 clients
usecases.text: A new client shouldn't mean a new mess. Onboarding, plans, check-in and payments run automatically. You focus on training.

usecases.title: Coaching agency or team
usecases.text: Scale plan supports up to 150 clients. Multiple trainers, one system, one overview - for the whole team.

faqs.q: What's the difference between UnitLift and Trainerize?
faqs.a: Trainerize is a large English-only app for bigger coaching operations. UnitLift is simpler, in English and Croatian, with clear pricing and 5-minute setup.

faqs.q: How long does setup take?
faqs.a: Less than 5 minutes. Set up your profile, add tracking parameters and send your first client the app link. No long manuals.

faqs.q: Can UnitLift replace all my current tools?
faqs.a: For most coaches - yes. It replaces Excel, WhatsApp, Google Sheets and separate apps for training and nutrition plans.

faqs.q: What if I have more than 150 clients?
faqs.a: Scale supports up to 150 clients. Beyond that, add €10 a month per 25 extra clients. No hidden fees.

faqs.q: Does it work for coaches doing both training and nutrition?
faqs.a: Yes. All plans include both training and nutrition. The client sees both in one app - no splitting across systems.

seoPageTracking.heroH1: Client tracking software with automatic weekly check-ins
seoPageTracking.heroSub: UnitLift collects weekly measurements, photos and how the client feels. You see progress on one screen - without chasing messages.
seoPageTracking.heroNote: Card required for activation · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime
seoPageTracking.problemTag: The problem without a tracking system
seoPageTracking.problemH2:
Without tracking you don't know
if your coaching actually works
seoPageTracking.problemSub: You feel they're progressing but you don't have numbers to prove it. When a client quits, you don't know if it was the plan, the food or motivation.

problemCards.title: No visibility into progress
problemCards.text: The client says 'it's going well', but without measurements and photos, those are impressions. You can't see trends or adjust by data.

problemCards.title: Check-in is chaos
problemCards.text: The client sends measurements on WhatsApp, photos by email, a comment in another message. You collect it by hand, every week.

problemCards.title: Clients quit without accountability
problemCards.text: Clients who submit a check-in every week stay longer. Without a system, you're missing the strongest retention tool you have.

seoPageTracking.featTag: What it looks like in practice
seoPageTracking.featH2:
Week by week -
all archived without your effort.
seoPageTracking.featSub: The client fills in a check-in in 2 minutes. You see it instantly - no copying, no chasing messages, no spreadsheets.

features.title: Structured weekly check-in
features.desc: The client fills in: body weight, measurements, photos, energy, sleep, plan adherence. One form, two minutes.

features.title: Automatic reminders
features.desc: The system sends a reminder to any client who hasn't submitted. Submission rate jumps from 40% to 90% without your intervention.

features.title: Progress graphs over time
features.desc: See the curve of weight, measurements and how the client feels across weeks and months. Adjust the plan on real data.

features.title: Progress photo archive
features.desc: All photos are archived chronologically. Compare week 1 and week 12 with one click. Private, secure, always there.

features.title: Instant insight, no typing
features.desc: The moment a client submits a check-in, you see it. No copying, no processing - just coaching on fresh data.

seoPageTracking.featVisualStatLbl: Check-in submission rate · Without a system: 38%
seoPageTracking.usecaseH2: For coaches who care what's really happening with the client

usecases.title: You coach on data, not guesses
usecases.text: You adjust every plan based on real measurements. Check-in data gives you concrete input for every conversation with the client.

usecases.title: Your clients stay longer
usecases.text: Clients who submit a check-in every week stay longer. Regular reporting builds habit and accountability without your manual tracking.

usecases.title: You have proof your work delivers
usecases.text: A photo archive and progress graphs become your strongest marketing asset. Real results, not generic claims.

faqs.q: What's the difference between UnitLift and Trainerize?
faqs.a: Trainerize is a large English-only app for bigger coaching operations. UnitLift is simpler, in English and Croatian, with clear pricing and 5-minute setup.

faqs.q: What does the client fill in for a check-in?
faqs.a: Weight, measurements (waist, hips, bicep), photos, energy level, sleep, plan adherence and a free comment. Every field is optional - you decide what matters.

faqs.q: Can I compare progress photos?
faqs.a: Yes. All photos are archived chronologically per client. You can compare any week with any other - front, side and back.

faqs.q: Does the system send automatic reminders?
faqs.a: Yes. Any client who hasn't submitted by a set day of the week gets a push notification. Submission rate jumps from 40% to 90%.

faqs.q: Can I track clients who aren't in UnitLift?
faqs.a: UnitLift runs through the mobile app. Without the app, the client has no structured check-in - they'd need a separate fitness app.

howItWorksPage.bottomFaqTitle: A few more questions before you start

bottomFaqs.q: Can I see the client app before I commit?
bottomFaqs.a: Yes. Download the client app and walk through the same flow: profile, plan, check-in.

bottomFaqs.q: What if I already have clients in a spreadsheet?
bottomFaqs.a: Add them with the basics. You don't have to import years of history on day one - the old spreadsheet can stay as an archive.

bottomFaqs.q: Is this online coaching software and a workout plan app at the same time?
bottomFaqs.a: Same account, same data. You plan on the web, the client follows in the app. What people search for differs; the work doesn't.

bottomFaqs.q: What if a client refuses to install the app?
bottomFaqs.a: The full experience is built around the app. Without it, the client has fewer options for tracking - that's a platform limit.

bottomFaqs.q: Does this handle charging my clients for me?
bottomFaqs.a: You see who paid and your totals for a period. The agreement and how you collect money is still between you and the client.
